questions.q: What is the name of the protagonist of the Naruto series?
Which tailed beast is sealed inside Naruto?
Which ninja village is Naruto from?
Who is Naruto's primary rival throughout the series?
What is the title the Hokage holds?
choices: The head of the ninja academy
The leader of a ninja village

questions.q: What kind of ninja techniques are called 'Jutsu' in Naruto?
How many times did Naruto fail the ninja graduation exam before passing?
What symbol is tattooed on Gaara's forehead?

What clan does Naruto belong to?
Who created the Naruto manga series?
What distinctive accessory does Naruto wear on his head?
Which ocular ability does Sasuke Uchiha possess?

What is the name of the jutsu that allows Rock Lee to open the inner gates?

What village is known for its misty environment?

What type of jutsu does the Sharingan belong to?
What is the name of Naruto's signature spinning energy technique?
Who was Naruto's father?
Which character is a member of Team 7 alongside Naruto and Sasuke?
What is the 'Forbidden Scroll' Naruto steals from Mizuki in the first episode?
Which classic Naruto character is widely known for his bushy eyebrows and bowl-cut hair?
Who is the original founder of the Akatsuki organization?

In the original series, which village does Sasuke defect to in pursuit of power to defeat his brother Itachi?
What bloodline ability does Kimimaro possess, allowing him to manipulate his skeletal structure as a weapon?
Which of the following is NOT one of the Five Kage (village leaders of the Five Great Nations)?
What is the name of the jutsu that allows a ninja to transfer their consciousness into another body, a technique Orochimaru obsessed over?
During the Chunin Exams, which hidden village's genin team is notably eliminated after facing Team 7?
What is the official name of the jutsu that Itachi uses to trap opponents in an infinite loop of suffering and torture?

choices: Year 63 of the Hidden Leaf Village calendar
Year 61 of the Hidden Leaf Village calendar
Year 60 of the Hidden Leaf Village calendar
Year 62 of the Hidden Leaf Village calendar

questions.q: What is the name of the hidden village located in the snow country where Haku originates?
Which member of the Akatsuki organization possesses the ability to control and manipulate white Zetsu clones as extensions of his will?
What is the name of Sasuke's older brother's signature technique that creates a powerful black flame capable of burning almost anything?
During the Chunin Exams, which hidden village did Orochimaru secretly control through his influence on its leadership?
What is the specific rank that Kakashi Hatake held before becoming the Sixth Hokage?
In what year during the series does Naruto officially become the Seventh Hokage?
choices: After the conclusion of the Fourth Great Ninja War

questions.q: What is the primary weakness of the Sharingan eye ability as demonstrated throughout the series?
choices: It is ineffective against taijutsu attacks
It loses power when exposed to sunlight
It cannot see through water-based jutsu
It consumes vast amounts of chakra and causes strain on the user's eyes
